hypothesis: If CHROMA's frozen Llama encoder size is increased (1B→3B→8B) and the Transformer decoder depth is increased (2→4→8 layers), then the mean CIE76 ΔE between simulated RGB of generated multilayer designs and target colors will decrease on both the training-paraphrase and held-out validation splits, and increasing the number of physical layers in the designs will further reduce ΔE across viewing angles (0°, 30°, 60°).
